name: sidecar
description: Claude Code plugin pack with strict concept separation. Top-level dirs: hooks/ (PreToolUse·SessionStart auto-behavior), commands/ (/slash-command invoked), skills/ (Skill tool invocable). 1 plugin = 1 concept; no mixing.

plugins.name: commons
plugins.description: SessionStart + PreCompact + PostCompact hook — injects a cross-project do/dont layer from commons.tape (tape v1.4 granular form, 17 `@D g1..g17` blocks with optional `tool` / `usage` fields per rule).

plugins.name: inbox
plugins.description: Cross-project handoff inbox — skill (natural language) + /inbox list / new <kind> <slug> for filing inbox/<kind>/<slug>.md entries in the current repo.

plugins.name: hexa-lsp
plugins.description: Wire the hexa-lang LSP server (`hexa lsp`) for `.hexa` files. Minimal: only `.hexa` claimed.

plugins.name: tape-lsp
plugins.description: Wire `tape-lsp` (canonical .tape v1.2 LSP — diagnostics + hover) for `.tape` files. Requires `tape-lsp` on PATH (install via `hx install dancinlab/tape`).

plugins.name: project-tape
plugins.description: PreCompact + PostCompact hook — re-injects <project-root>/project.tape as additionalContext so the project's identity + governance survive auto-compaction. No-op when project.tape is absent.

plugins.name: git-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse(Bash) deny for force-push · force-with-lease · refspec-force · git {commit,merge,rebase} --no-verify. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GIT_GUARD=1.

plugins.name: pool-route
plugins.description: PreToolUse(Bash) suggestion hook — when a command is host-specific (macOS-only: swift/xcodebuild/xcrun · GPU/CUDA: nvidia-smi/nvcc), inject an additionalContext suggesting the appropriate `pool on <host>` dispatch. Non-blocking. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_POOL_ROUTE=1.

plugins.name: all-bg-go
plugins.description: Parallel fan-out trigger — when the previous assistant turn offered multiple branches/options and the user says 'all bg go' (or equivalent), print a plan table first (branch · subagent_type · isolation · goal) then spawn one background Agent per branch in the same message. Skill (natural language) + /all-bg-go command.

plugins.name: easy
plugins.description: Easy (friendly) response style — 7-element pattern (icon · name · alias · plain-line · analogy · ASCII · compare). Skill (natural-language trigger) + /easy command. 5 language samples: en · ko · ja · zh · ru.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research-fetch tools — `/research:arxiv <query|id>` searches the official arXiv API or fetches by id (title · authors · abstract · pdf); `/research:yt <url-or-id>` extracts YouTube caption transcript via the InnerTube ANDROID client. Pure Python stdlib — no pip deps, no API keys, no binaries.

plugins.name: gh-stack
plugins.description: Stacked-PR workflow skill — proposes `gh stack` commands (enabled repos) or the manual `gh pr create --base previous-layer` fallback. Encodes the <200-lines-per-layer · 1-concern governance.
